---
title: textur - class notes
subtitle: "Text und Textur. Vom Webstuhl bis zu Large Language Models"
format: html
# tmeta: $testmeta$
# date: '`r format(Sys.time())`'
date: "2026-07-07"
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-expand: true
title-meta: ""
metadata-files:
  - _quarto-common-textur.yml
---

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}
{{< meta cmeta >}}
:::

{{< include _gitcom.qmd >}} 

```{r,echo=F,eval=T}
print("engine on...")
#val <- quarto::quarto_metadata$get("meta")
#meta <- knitr::metadata
#params <- meta$
#val<-params$tmeta
val.f<-"fixed val"
val.c<-"{{< meta testmeta >}}"
```


## 7.
###### postdigital, surface reading LLMs

{{< include _ul-md/textur/16253.md >}} 

## 12.
###### bergen gpt stories

{{< include _ul-md/textur/16282.md >}}
